papers.title: Empowering scientific discovery with explainable small domain-specific and large language models
papers.abstract: A comprehensive review exploring how combining domain-specific small models with large language models can empower scientific discovery with explainable AI capabilities.

papers.title: Unlocking the Potential of AI Researchers in Scientific Discovery: What Is Missing?
papers.abstract: The potential of AI researchers in scientific discovery remains largely untapped. Over the past decade, AI4Science publications in 145 Nature Index journals have increased fifteen-fold, yet they still account for less than 3% of the total publications.
